sections.sectionTitle: Vantung mite, A Nunung Gimnate Tawh

verses.text: Tua ciangin vanah na lamdang lian mahmah khat ka mu hi. Gimna nam sagih a hong keng vantung mi sagih om uh a, Pasian' hehna a lah tawpna uh ahih manin a nunung pente ahi uh hi

Tua ciangin mei tawh a kihel limlang peekpi kiphah tuipi tawh a kibang ka mu hi. Ganhing, a lim, leh a min nambat tawh a kipiasa a zote, Pasian' lasakna harpte tawi-in tuipi tawh a kibang gei-ah a ding uh hi
Amaute in Pasian' nasem Moses la leh Tuuno la sa uh a, “A Vanglian Topa Pasian aw, na nasepnate lamdangin lian mahmah hi. Khang tawntunga Kumpipa aw, na nasepnate-ah thumanin na thutang hi

Topa aw, nang, kua in hong kihtalo ding a, na liatna hong phatlo ding ahi hiam? Nang bek na siangtho hi. Thumanin na sepnate mi khempeuh in mu uh ahih manin minam khempeuh nang kiangah hong pai-in, na mai-ah hong bia ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi
Tua khit ciangin ka khuadak leh a sungah Pasian' Ompihna Mun a om vantung biakinn a kihong ka mu hi
Tua biakinn sung panin vantung mi sagih, gimna sagih tawh hong pusuak uh a, puanpak silhin, kham awmgak tawh a awm uh a gak uh hi
Ganhing lite sung panin khat in a nungta tawntung Pasian' hehna a dim hai sagih, vantung mi sagihte kiangah a pia hi
Tua biakinn sungah Pasian' minthan'na leh a vangliatna khu kidim ahih manin, vantung mi sagihte in hong paipih gimna sagih a ven' matengin biakinn sungah kuamah lut theilo uh hi.
